props.name: status
props.description: Current connection state. Drives both the trigger and the drawer body.

props.name: address
props.description: The connected account's address. Required when status="connected".

props.name: name
props.description: Optional display name (ENS, handle). Rendered above the address.

props.name: chainName
props.description: Chain name (e.g. "Base"). Shown as a NetworkBadge in the drawer.

props.name: chainIcon
props.description: Optional chain icon; forwarded to NetworkBadge.

props.name: balance
props.description: Balance block rendered below the header; pass a <TokenAmount> or your own.

props.name: transactions
props.description: Transaction list slot rendered below the balance; e.g. <TxStatus> items.

props.name: actions
props.description: Extra actions rendered in the footer above the Disconnect row.

props.name: onConnect
props.description: Called when the user clicks the disconnected-state Connect button.

props.name: onDisconnect
props.description: Called when the user clicks the Disconnect button.

props.name: title
props.description: Title for the drawer; defaults to "Wallet".

props.name: description
props.description: Description text under the title in the drawer header.

props.name: withTrigger
props.description:
Controls whether the drawer renders its own trigger; set false when you
want to wire the open state from outside.
